reason: Verified that the QA-20260701-224720-bjzv agent successfully responds to a math question with the correct answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully with sidebar showing two agents (QA-20260701-224722-lcmr and QA-20260701-224720-bjzv)
Found and clicked the "QA-20260701-224720-bjzv" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent's home page with the agent name and status displayed
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" (visible in the top right of the page), which meets the requirement
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Typed the message into the message input field and clicked the send button
Waited for response — Response arrived in 1 second (well within the 3-minute timeout)

Verified the response mentions "4" and took a screenshot — The agent responded with exactly "4", and a screenshot was captured showing the complete conversation with the correct answer clearly visible in the chat
